description: THE VEHICLE: 2018 Ferrari 812 Superfast This example is presented in showroom condition, meeting the rigorous Blackline Standard. • Price: AED 1,149,000 (VAT Inclusive) • Finance: From AED 17,464 / Month (20% Down Payment) • Mileage: 26,434 KM's • Spec: European Specs • Warranty: Ferrari Warranty until 3rd July 2027 • Service: Full Dealer History FACTORY SPECIFICATION HIGHLIGHTS: - Adaptive Headlights with SBL Function - Alcantara Boot Carpet - Alcantara Interior Carpet - Rear Shelf Leather Bags - Black Air Vent Grips on Dashboard - Yellow Brake Callipers - Carbon Fibre Upper Tunnel Trim - Alcantara Centre Console - Suspension Lifter - Cavallino Stitched on Headrests - Carbon Fibre Steering Wheel with LEDs - ‘SCUDERIA FERRARI’ Shields - Front and Rear Parking Cameras - Passenger Display - Aluminium Rev Counter - Daytona Racing Seats - Racing Seat Lifter - Matte Black Forged Racing Wheels - Alcantara Parcel Shelf - Alcantara Rear Wheel - High Power Hi-Fi Sound System - Upper Part in Alcantara WHY BLACKLINE MOTOR COMPANY? We don't just sell cars; we hand select the finest automotive inventory in the UAE. Every Blackline vehicle undergoes a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it exceeds expectations. Trade-Ins & Consignment Welcome: Top market rates for your current vehicle. Flexible Finance: Several deposit options available. Expertise: Over 50 years of combined luxury automotive experience.
